svg.title: LithePG v1.0 app-icon PNG IDAT inflated-length gate evidence
svg.desc: Evidence summary for the 2026-06-23 release-helper hardening slice.
svg.text: 2026-06-23 09:12 EDT · app icon PNG IDAT inflated-length gate

g.text: • package_verify.sh now computes expected PNG scanline bytes from dimensions, bit depth,
color type, and interlace method, then requires IDAT zlib output to match exactly.
• v10_release_gate.sh applies the same check inside LithePG.app.zip artifact validation.
• Valid shell-test icon fixtures now generate complete 1024×1024 RGBA scanline data.
package verifier unexpectedly accepted an AppIcon.icns whose high-resolution PNG
IDAT stream is too short for the declared dimensions
✓ swift build + swift test — 127 tests across 20 suites passed
✓ artifact-only preflight clear; release zip SHA-256 matched approved input
⚠ dogfood_check blocked locally: Docker unavailable in cron environment
